dependencies: Steel, aluminum, brass, copper, polypropylene supply
Fluorochemicals used in fire suppression agents
Global supplier network for raw materials and components
Single supplier or limited group of suppliers for certain key parts
risks: Material cost inflation and component shortages
Labor shortages and labor relations issues
Dependency on suppliers without guaranteed supply arrangements
Concentration risk with limited suppliers for key components

regulatory_risks: Environmental laws and regulations governing operations and remediation
Worker safety and health laws
PFAS regulations (PFOS, PFOA, and other per- and poly-fluoroalkyl substances)
EPA National Primary Drinking Water Regulation for PFAS compounds
CERCLA hazardous substance designation for PFOA and PFOS
Resource Conservation and Recovery Act (RCRA) proposed rules for PFAS
Refrigerant regulations and declining emission standards
Hydrofluorocarbon/emissions reduction regulations
Energy efficiency standards and building performance standards
Climate change regulations and greenhouse gas emission targets
Fire safety codes and alarm industry licensing laws
Security industry licensing and regulations
Data privacy laws and regulations (varying by jurisdiction)
Biometric security technology restrictions
Government procurement and security regulations
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA)
U.K. Bribery Act and similar anti-bribery laws
Export controls and customs regulations
Anti-trust regulations
Currency exchange control and transfer pricing regulations
Tax laws and treaties (including OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax)
U.S. Inflation Reduction Act provisions
Product safety regulations and quality standards
Intellectual property regulations
Employment and labor regulations
Cybersecurity and data protection requirements from customers and governments
Wisconsin groundwater quality standards for PFAS
State and local environmental remediation requirements

sanction_risks: Economic sanctions and embargoes affecting operations
Regional instability from ongoing conflicts (Russia-Ukraine, Israel-Hamas)
Collateral consequences from cyber conflicts between nation-states
